sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BNL SEC Filings - Broadstone Net Lease Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Broadstone Net Lease (BNL) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and insider trading forms, offering detailed insights into the company's financial performance and regulatory disclosures. Stock Titan enhances these filings with AI-powered summaries and real-time updates from EDGAR. The article also provides key stock data, such as market cap and current stock price, and ranks BNL by various financial metrics.

feed.title: Why Is Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Stock Soaring Today
feed.summary: Shares of Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) jumped 10% after the company introduced new security advancements for AI adoption and strengthened enterprise resilience, including the HPE Juniper Networking SRX400 Series Firewalls. This move supports HPE's transformation into a key player in high-performance networking and its "AI Factory" vision, further bolstered by a $2 billion debt offering and strong quarterly earnings. The stock's current performance shows a 7.2% increase year-to-date, trading near its 52-week high, despite some recent volatility due to geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: CERAWEEK Exxon says its team is in Venezuela evaluating oil opportunities
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil has sent a team to Venezuela to evaluate the country's oil and gas resources and infrastructure. This move comes despite CEO Darren Woods previously calling Venezuela "uninvestable" due to concerns about protections for new investments, a stance that drew criticism from U.S. President Donald Trump. While short-term actions could boost production incrementally, fully rebuilding Venezuela's oil industry would be a massive, long-term undertaking requiring hundreds of billions of dollars.

feed.title: Kansas-based Evergy settles class action lawsuit over employees’ 401(k) plan
feed.summary: Evergy has settled a class action lawsuit filed by former employees who alleged the company failed to adequately manage investments in its 401(k) retirement plan. The lawsuit claimed that Evergy inadequately monitored underperforming American Century Target Date Funds, leading to significant losses for employees. While Evergy maintains it acted appropriately, the settlement aims to conclude the litigation, with terms subject to court review and approval.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Increases Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) Price Target to $205.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has raised its price target for Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) shares from $175.00 to $205.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 13.49% from the current price. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price objectives for the oil and gas company, with the stock currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target of $164.00.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has issued $2,000,000 in Auto Callable Contingent Interest and Contingent Leveraged Notes linked to the MSCI Emerging Markets Index, with a maturity date of March 28, 2030, and fully guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments offer contingent interest payments during the first year, provided the index level stays above a specified trigger value, and an enhanced payment at maturity if the notes are not automatically called and the index performs above certain thresholds. The notes carry significant risks, including potential loss of principal and credit risks associated with both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: Ford CEO Farley has been taking road trips to test vehicles and meet customers for years. He shares his favorite memories, photos and why they matter. See link below ⬇️ 📸 Provided by Ford Motor
feed.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley regularly takes road trips to test vehicles and interact with customers, an experience he shares through memories and photos. These trips offer him a critical perspective beyond the company's Dearborn headquarters. The Detroit Free Press provides a link to a full story detailing these impactful journeys.

feed.title: The Boeing Company stock draws bullish analyst targets up to $295 amid 787 delivery resumption and p
feed.summary: The Boeing Company stock has garnered bullish analyst attention, with targets up to $295, following the resumption of 787 Dreamliner deliveries and strong demand for its 737 MAX jets. Despite production challenges, analysts are optimistic about Boeing's ability to fulfill its large order backlog, supported by stable defense contracts which provide an important buffer against commercial volatility. US investors find the stock appealing as a recovery play, underpinned by regulatory approvals and a diversified revenue stream.

feed.title: Florida power customers saw $30.5M in bill aid reach nearly 31,000
feed.summary: Duke Energy Florida provided nearly $30.5 million in bill assistance to approximately 31,000 customers in 2025. This support comes in addition to the removal of storm cost recovery charges from customer bills in February, which lowered residential bills by about $44 per 1,000 kWh. The company offers multiple programs and payment options, including the Share the Light Fund, LIHEAP, and installment plans, to help eligible customers manage their energy costs.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Corp. stock faces 2026 headwinds from capex cuts and institutional shifts amid rail sector pressures
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corp. is experiencing mixed institutional investor activity, with Avanza Fonder AB increasing its stake while Assenagon Asset Management S.A. offloaded shares. The company projects a sharp decline in capital expenditures for 2026 and maintains a resilient cash conversion rate, reflecting a strategic focus on efficiency and free cash flow generation. These moves are crucial for US investors monitoring the rail operator's ability to navigate economic pressures and capitalize on long-term growth opportunities like the Blue Creek coal mine expansion.

feed.title: 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks Paying Over 5% - And How to Boost Their Income
feed.summary: The article identifies three high-yield dividend stocks—United Parcel Service (UPS), Enterprise Products (EPD), and T. Rowe Price (TROW)—that are currently paying over 5% dividends. It explains how investors can further boost their income from these stocks by selling covered call options, potentially achieving combined returns ranging from 11% to 15% through January 2027. The author emphasizes the stability and income-generating potential of dividend stocks, especially when supplemented with options strategies.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan, Phillips 66 extend open season for proposed Western Gateway pipeline
feed.summary: Kinder Morgan and Phillips 66 have extended the open season for their proposed Western Gateway Pipeline until April 17, 2026. This pipeline project aims to transport crude oil from the Rockies and Bakken production regions to Phillips 66's Sweeny refinery, with connections to other Houston-area refineries and export facilities. The extension reflects continued efforts to gather commitments for the project.

feed.title: Brendan Caldwell's Top Picks: Amphenol, Howmet Aerospace & Alphabet
feed.summary: Brendan Caldwell, President & CEO of Caldwell Investment Management, has revealed his top stock picks, which include Amphenol, Howmet Aerospace, and Alphabet. The article highlights Caldwell's recommendations for investors to consider in the current market.

feed.title: Is Membership-Led Expansion and Value Pricing Altering The Investment Case For Costco (COST)?
feed.summary: Costco's recent strong quarterly results, high membership renewal rates, and expansion into areas like gas stations and low-priced private label products reinforce its membership-driven growth strategy. While these developments further solidify its value proposition, they also introduce factors like fuel price volatility and the ongoing challenge of managing rising labor and import costs, which could pressure margins. Analysts have varying outlooks, with some cautious about slower revenue growth and compressed margins affecting valuation.

feed.title: General Electric Deepens Nuclear And Aerospace Commitments With Long Cycle Bets
feed.summary: General Electric is expanding its involvement in high-tech energy and aerospace sectors through significant long-term investments. GE Vernova and Hitachi have formed a joint venture to develop 3 GW of modular nuclear reactors, aligning with a large international energy deal. Separately, GE Aerospace is investing €110 million to boost its manufacturing capacity in Europe, further integrating into major aircraft and engine programs.

feed.title: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. Experiences Revision in Stock Evaluation Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. has adjusted its valuation, characterized by a high P/E ratio of 63 and a low price-to-book value of 0.52. The company has faced significant performance declines, with its stock decreasing 14.17% in the past week, 32.74% over one month, and 14.06% over one year, underperforming the S&P 500. These financial metrics and performance trends highlight its unique position within the furniture and home furnishing industry.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Exits 3 Biotechs but Keeps Stakes in These Rumored Acquisition Targets
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson exited its stakes in Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals, BiomX, and Senseonics Holdings during the fourth quarter, according to a recent SEC filing. However, the company maintained its investments in several other biotechnology firms that are considered potential acquisition targets. This strategic move suggests a re-evaluation of its biotech portfolio while retaining interest in companies with significant acquisition rumors.

feed.title: B2Gold Corp. Hits Day Low of CAD 5.31 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: B2Gold Corp. experienced significant stock volatility, hitting an intraday low of CAD 5.31 and declining 18.7% on March 20, 2026. Despite a positive annual return of 14.93%, the company has recorded negative results for six consecutive quarters and faces challenges with low operating cash flow. However, it maintains a favorable debt-to-equity ratio of 0.05.

feed.title: Smucker Packaging Refresh Puts Spotlight On Brand And Valuation Story
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) has unveiled a significant redesign of its fruit spreads packaging, the first major update in nearly 30 years. This refresh aims to modernize the brand's shelf presence while maintaining its familiar identity, a critical move for consumer engagement and in-store visibility. Investors are encouraged to monitor retail support, promotions, and how the redesign impacts revenue and margin trends, as the company's debt coverage by operating cash flow is not strong.

feed.title: RBC (RBMCF) launches Boeing‑linked auto‑call notes with high quarterly coupon
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada is offering $1,009,000 in Auto-Callable Contingent Coupon Barrier Notes linked to The Boeing Company's stock. These notes offer a high quarterly contingent coupon of $29.50 per $1,000 and can be automatically called if Boeing's stock reaches a specific level. However, they carry significant downside risk, including potential principal loss if Boeing's stock falls below a certain barrier, and investors do not participate in any appreciation of the underlying stock.

feed.title: Assurant Inc. stock faces uncertainty amid insurance sector pressures as of March 2026
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. stock is facing uncertainty amidst broader insurance sector pressures as of March 2026, with no major company-specific catalysts emerging in the last 48 hours. The company, a specialty insurance provider listed on the NYSE, is impacted by rising claims costs, regulatory scrutiny, and catastrophe risks, despite resilience in its device protection and extended warranty segments. Investors are urged to watch for earnings signals and monitor how the firm balances growth with sector-wide challenges, leveraging its diversified footprint and strong financial metrics.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma to open at Hughes Landing in The Woodlands Fall 2026
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma is set to open a new 5,000-square-foot store at Hughes Landing Retail Row in The Woodlands by Fall 2026. This addition will bring its signature kitchenware, home furnishings, and gourmet food products to the mixed-use destination. The Howard Hughes Communities confirmed this development, enhancing Hughes Landing's retail offerings.

feed.title: Pentair (PNR) Announces Chair David A. Jones to Retire
feed.summary: Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR) announced that its Chair, David A. Jones, will retire from the Board on May 5, 2026, after serving since 2003 and as Chair since 2018. T. Michael Glenn, an independent director, will succeed him. This announcement follows recent positive Q4 earnings for Pentair, exceeding analyst expectations, and a slight reduction in its price target by Seaport Research analyst Scott Graham, who nonetheless maintained a Buy rating.

feed.title: Immix stock wins Morgan Stanley bullish view (IMMX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has initiated coverage of Immix Biopharma (IMMX) with an Overweight rating and a $20 price target, causing the stock to trade higher. Analyst Judah Frommer based his bullish view on the potential of the company's lead candidate, NXC-201. This development highlights positive analyst sentiment regarding Immix Biopharma's prospects.

feed.title: Linde plc stock surges on quarterly earnings beat and robust growth outlook amid industrial gas demand boom
feed.summary: Linde plc exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, leading to a significant stock rally. The industrial gas giant reported strong sales and profit growth, driven by resilient demand in electronics, healthcare, and clean energy sectors, particularly in North America. The company's defensive positioning, strong free cash flow, and sustained dividend increases make it an attractive investment amid economic uncertainties.

feed.title: The Trade Desk says Omnicom audits ‘have not identified any issues’
feed.summary: The Trade Desk reported that Omnicom's audits found no issues, contrasting with Publicis's recent audit alleging hidden fees and unauthorized features. This comes amidst ongoing tensions between The Trade Desk and agency holding companies regarding transparency and direct client relationships. The demand-side platform's shares tumbled following the news, highlighting the broader debate around programmatic advertising billing practices.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group stock faces mixed signals after Morgan Stanley upgrade amid shifting insur
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFF) received an upgrade from Morgan Stanley to Equal-weight with an $81 target due to an improved revenue outlook and reduced business risks. Despite this positive signal and an attractive 3.80% dividend yield, the stock faces mixed signals from recent fund sales and downgrades. US investors are monitoring its resilience near 52-week highs and its focus on stable, long-term products in a volatile insurance sector.

feed.title: Intel Corporation stock faces critical juncture amid AI chip race and foundry delays on Nasdaq
feed.summary: Intel Corporation is at a critical juncture due to delays in its advanced 18A manufacturing process and intense competition in the AI chip market from rivals like TSMC and Nvidia. The company aims to reclaim leadership through its US-based foundry services, fueled by CHIPS Act funding, providing a domestic alternative to supply chains. Despite challenges, Intel's stock offers leveraged exposure to AI growth at discounted multiples, with potential future catalysts from AI PC launches and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Kinder Morgan, Phillips 66 extend open season for proposed Western Gateway pipeline (KMI:NYSE)
feed.summary: Kinder Morgan and Phillips 66 have extended the open season for their proposed 1,300-mile Western Gateway pipeline system. The pipeline is planned to run from St. Louis, Missouri, to California. This extension allows more time for bidding on the remaining capacity in the system.

feed.title: MGM Resorts Opens Bookings for New All-Inclusive Vacation Bundle
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has introduced a new all-inclusive vacation bundle for its Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino properties on the Las Vegas Strip. Starting at $330 plus tax for a two-night stay for two, the package includes accommodations, daily resort fees, dining at select MGM Resorts restaurants, entertainment, and parking. Bookings are now open for stays beginning April 6, featuring dynamic pricing and no blackout dates.

feed.title: Brewer, Attorneys & Counselors: Former CFO Prevails – Judge Denies CBIZ Bid to Halt Valuation Fraud Lawsuit; Discovery to Proceed
feed.summary: A federal judge has denied motions by CBIZ Inc. and CBIZ MAG LLC to halt a lawsuit alleging valuation fraud, allowing the case to proceed into full discovery. Christopher Podlasek, former CFO of AmeriTex Holdings LLC, claims that Marcum LLP conspired to produce a materially understated business valuation, depriving him of over $25 million owed for his equity stake. The ruling paves the way for a trial to investigate allegations of intentional breaches of duty and shines a light on corporate valuation services.

feed.title: Nobel Prize-winning research hub Gladstone Institutes expands with major Mission Bay lease
feed.summary: The Gladstone Institutes, a Nobel Prize-winning research hub, has significantly expanded its footprint in Mission Bay by signing a major lease with Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc. The San Francisco Business Times had previously reported on Gladstone's interest in acquiring this space near its headquarters. This expansion suggests a significant move for the institute, potentially enabling further research and development in the area.

feed.title: PepsiCo hits pair of water replenishment, stewardship targets
feed.summary: PepsiCo has achieved two critical water sustainability targets, moving closer to its 2030 goal of becoming net water positive. The company now replenishes all water used at its facilities in high-risk watersheds and has adopted the Alliance for Water Stewardship Standard across all manufacturing sites in such areas. These achievements, announced ahead of World Water Day, reflect PepsiCo's commitment to investing in water infrastructure, conservation, and efficiency programs globally, restoring nearly 29 billion liters of water last year.

feed.title: Caterpillar countersues Bobcat in escalating patent fight
feed.summary: Caterpillar is countersuing Bobcat North America, escalating a patent dispute into a broader legal battle over compact machine technologies. Caterpillar, seeking damages and an injunction, alleges infringement on six patents related to machine control, hydraulics, and power management. This counter-suit comes after Bobcat's initial complaint accusing Caterpillar of infringing on 14 patents, broadening the conflict and highlighting intense competition in the global construction equipment market.

feed.title: Threats to cut your power fast? PSEG Long Island says verify first
feed.summary: PSEG Long Island is warning customers about an increase in utility payment scams where imposters threaten immediate power shutoffs if payment is not made through specific methods like web-based services, prepaid cards, or Bitcoin. The company advises customers to "Stop and verify" by checking their account online or calling the official customer service number (1-800-490-0025) before complying with any demands. PSEG Long Island emphasizes that its representatives will never demand immediate payment using these unconventional methods, nor will they require deposits for meter installations or discuss account details with anyone other than the Customer of Record.

feed.title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Commerce Bancshares Stock?
feed.summary: The options market indicates a potential significant price movement for Commerce Bancshares (CBSH) stock, with high implied volatility in its May 15, 2026 $30.00 Call options. Despite analysts rating the stock as a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and mixed earnings estimates, this increased options activity suggests that traders anticipate a substantial event or believe the stock could experience a rapid change in value. Options traders might use this high implied volatility to sell premium, expecting the underlying stock not to move as much as predicted.

feed.title: DFAC ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:DFAC
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Dimensional U.S. Core Equity 2 ETF (DFAC), detailing its key statistics such as AUM, dividend yield, and expense ratio. It outlines DFAC's actively managed strategy focusing on long-term capital appreciation with tax minimization, targeting diversified US companies with a tilt towards small-cap, low relative price, and high profitability firms. The analysis also covers the fund's sector allocation, geographic exposure, top holdings, and recent performance metrics.

feed.title: Can Hormel Foods' International & Foodservice Offset Retail Weakness?
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation is relying on its International and Foodservice segments to counteract a decline in its Retail business. While these segments are performing well, they haven't fully compensated for the weakness in Retail, which saw decreased sales and profits. The company's stock currently trades at a premium, indicating market confidence in its stability despite persistent challenges in the Retail sector.

feed.title: CEG vs. VST: Which Nuclear Stock Has the Edge in the Utility Sector?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) and Vistra Energy Corp. (VST), two prominent U.S. utility companies with significant nuclear operations, to determine which presents a stronger investment opportunity. It compares their earnings growth projections, nuclear energy generation capacity, return on equity, long-term capital expenditure plans, valuation, dividend yields, and recent price performance. Based on these factors, Vistra Energy is deemed to have a marginal edge due to better earnings estimate movements, a stronger return on equity, and a cheaper valuation.

feed.title: +3.02% for Canopy Growth stock as oversold signals clash with bearish momentum
feed.summary: Canopy Growth stock (CGC) saw a 3.02% increase, trading at $0.99, despite maintaining a bearish technical setup and trading below all key moving averages. While momentum indicators show weak bullish attempts and oversold conditions, analysts see persistent downside pressure and anticipate continued consolidation between $0.97 and $1.03. A sustained break above $1.05 is needed for a potential recovery.

feed.title: PFG Shares Surpass Industry Performance: What Actions Should Investors Consider Next?
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFG) has outperformed the broader insurance multi-line industry over the past year, with a 2.4% stock price increase against the industry's 9.9% drop. The company shows an attractive valuation, strong growth outlook with projected EPS increases, and consistent shareholder returns through dividends and share repurchases. Analysts generally project further upside for PFG shares, indicating its strong market position and capital management.

feed.title: UBS Group Lowers Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Price Target to $94.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has reduced its price target for Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) to $94.00 from $104.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the biopharmaceutical company's stock. This new target implies a potential upside of 1.72% from the previous closing price. The article also details other recent analyst ratings, Incyte's price performance, Q4 2025 earnings results, and significant insider transactions, as well as institutional investor activity.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is issuing Buffered Digital Notes linked to the Lesser Performing of the Russell 2000® Index and the S&P 500® Index, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes offer investors a fixed return of at least 9.15% at maturity if the lesser performing index is greater than or equal to its Initial Value or is less by up to 20.00%. Investors should be prepared to forsake interest and dividend payments and risk losing up to 80.00% of their principal.

feed.title: Century Communities Announces Grand Openings for New Homes in Austell and McDonough, GA
feed.summary: Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS) is hosting Grand Opening events in March 2026 for two new communities in the Atlanta Metro area: Magnolia Square in Austell and Walker Grove in McDonough. Magnolia Square offers modern townhomes near amenities, while Walker Grove provides single-family homes with community features. Both communities will hold public Grand Opening events on Saturday, March 28, offering tours, food, and savings.

feed.title: NYSE American Options resolves technical issue that hit trading, market data
feed.summary: NYSE American Options, a division of Intercontinental Exchange (ICE.N), announced on Wednesday that it has resolved a technical issue that had impacted its trading, post-trade, and market data systems. The exchange operator confirmed that all systems are now fully operational. The issue was reported on March 25, 2026, and resolved on the same day.

feed.title: Raymond James maintains Fair Isaac stock rating on score business risks
feed.summary: Raymond James has reiterated an Outperform rating for Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO) with a $2,010 price target despite recent stock declines, considering the sell-off potentially "overdone." Concerns about the company's Scores business and potential actions by the Federal Housing Finance Agency are legitimate, but Raymond James assigns low probability to market share losses to VantageScore. The firm suggests Fair Isaac will be less aggressive with price increases, a stance supported by InvestingPro data indicating the stock is undervalued and in oversold territory based on its RSI.

feed.title: What is behind CleanSpark stock's recent gain in value today
feed.summary: CleanSpark (CLSK) stock rose 3.10% despite trading below key moving averages and an earlier fiscal Q1 earnings miss of -$1.35 EPS and $181.2 million revenue. The company also removed its recurring Series A Preferred Stock dividend in favor of a one-time payout and granted significant stock-based awards to its leadership. Analysts offer mixed views, with some cautioning against aggressive entries due to bearish technicals and others seeing potential for long-term growth due to corporate governance changes and leadership incentives.

feed.title: Why Is Cohen & Steers Preferred Sec & Inc I (CPXIX) Stock Down Today?
feed.summary: Cohen & Steers Preferred Sec & Inc I (CPXIX) stock is currently down -0.16% at $12.39, reflecting negative investor sentiment. The stock is trading below both its 50-day ($12.65) and 200-day ($12.57) moving averages, indicating short-term and long-term weakness, respectively. Meyka's AI assigns CPXIX an "Overall fair" grade of C, with forecast models projecting potential returns of -1.05% in 1 month, +3.59% in 1 year, and +10.01% in 5 years.

feed.title: Tadeu Marroco Sells 9,383 Shares of British American Tobacco (LON:BATS) Stock
feed.summary: Tadeu Marroco, an insider at British American Tobacco (LON:BATS), sold 9,383 shares of the company's stock on March 23rd at an average price of GBX 4,284, totaling £401,967.72. The article notes recent trading activity for BATS, including a share price increase to GBX 4,352 and significant trading volume, alongside financial metrics like market capitalization, P/E ratio, and recent earnings per share. Analyst ratings show a mixed view with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of GBX 4,500.

feed.title: Accelerated Debt Redemption Might Change The Case For Investing In Compass Minerals International (CMP)
feed.summary: Compass Minerals International recently completed the full redemption of US$150 million of 6.750% Senior Notes due 2027, accelerating its debt reduction efforts. This move, alongside prior financing and dividend suspension, prioritizes balance sheet strength and deleveraging over capital returns or aggressive growth. Investors should weigh the benefits of reduced debt and interest costs against the company's inherent earnings volatility from weather and commodities.
